_meta.source: Aqours (Love Live! Sunshine!!) characters, derived from raw data with fan vote data considered as evidence
_meta.note_on_fan_votes: Fan MBTI votes provided as input signal but not treated as authoritative. Used as weighted evidence alongside textual analysis. Majority vote followed when supported by independent analysis; flagged when close.
_meta.note_on_traits_format: Each trait includes both score (-10 to +10) and reason (textual justification from analysis).

chika_takami.name: Chika Takami

E.reason: Strong extrovert. Energetic-sociable baseline, persistent-recruiter (badgers Dia repeatedly for club approval), mediator-role (steps in for Kanan/Mari fight when Dia freezes), natural leader who recruits members and broadcasts mission outward, initiates with strangers (approaches Riko proactively after move-in), makes puns and explains them unprompted (outward-broadcast humor habit). Not Ai-tier (+9) max because she also has reserved-private moments (S1 Ep 8 hidden frustration after disappointing performance, S1 Ep 11 jealousy negotiation around Riko-friendship), and her energy has stamina-limits unlike pure-radiation extroverts.

J.reason: Solid J. Multi-year sustained Love Live goal-pursuit across 2 seasons, training discipline (Miracle Wave training arc shows physical-discipline-through-pain), tactical structured-solutions (mikan trolley to balance preliminaries + school festival), structured-leadership across club founding and growth, primary-lyricist role requires sustained creative-output discipline. Not max because she's also adaptive-improvisational after failures (paper airplane symbol — keeps throwing despite repeated falls), pivots strategy when reality forces it (couldn't save school like μ's, found new shine), and reddit B notes she 'starts with naivety and hubris that never fully goes away' suggesting persistent improvisation rather than rigid-planner.

T.reason: Strong F. Entirely feeling-and-relational-driven cognition. Mediates conflicts (Kanon/Mari), suppresses-own-emotions-for-group-morale (explicit text: 'tries hard not to cry... it would drag down others' morale'), helps-individual-members-find-themselves mission (Ruby/Hanamaru/Yoshiko/Riko all benefit from Chika's relational-enabling), 'heavily dislikes when her friends get into confrontations she deems petty' (Fe-harmony-protection trigger), no analytical/logical cognition anywhere. Her decisions come from felt-conviction and group-state-reading, not from systematic-logic.

C.reason: Neutral per Rule 3 (baseline-not-presentation). External presentation has persistent-recruiter confidence even early (badgering Dia, declaring she'll start a club, approaching strangers). But baseline self-image is foundational-inadequacy: 'Normal Monster Chika,' explicitly self-identified as ordinary-with-no-passion-no-special-skill, reddit C: 'goofy but deeply insecure,' reddit B 'starts with no special skills,' reddit A: 'she didn't have a passion in her life, she lacked a dream' before discovering school idols. Earns substantial confidence through 2-season arc (reddit C: 'fundamentally changed... more even-tempered confidence'). External-pursuit-confidence riding over internal-Normal-Monster-baseline cancels to neutral.

M.reason: High. Strong sustained want — wants to shine like μ's, pursues Love Live across 2 seasons relentlessly, recruits members one-by-one despite repeated rejection, refuses-to-give-up through 0-vote loss + school-merger-announcement + multiple competition setbacks, 'stubborn and quick to anger' when blocked (per reddit B), 'From Zero to One' and later 'From One to something even greater' as articulated mission. Per M = the WANT not the WORK rule, her want is genuine and intense even when initially emulation-driven (wanting to be like Honoka/μ's). Not max (Lanzhu/Megumi +8-9 tier) because the want is shine-pursuit and personal-meaning-finding (somewhat abstract) rather than competitive-domination or empire-building scale.

O.reason: Very high. 'Positive can-do attitude' baseline that 'gradually begins to affect everyone around her,' paper airplane symbol (Reddit B: 'a paper airplane she throws over and over no matter how many times it falls back down'), recovers from every failure including 0-vote-loss + school-merger + Saint-Snow-disrespect + lost-school-after-winning, reddit B: 'no matter how bruised and battered Chika gets, she keeps going.' Same tier as Yu/Ai/Kaho — textbook resilience character. Tempered slightly because she does have real breakdown-moments (S1 Ep 8 frustration, post-zero-vote ocean-running, can-cry-when-needed) — her resilience is earned-through-pain rather than naive-cheerfulness, but it consistently wins.

A.reason: High empathy through Fe-broadcast. Suppresses own emotions for group's sake, mediates conflicts, helps individual members through their issues (Ruby/Hanamaru shells, Yoshiko self-acceptance, Riko piano-confidence), 'loves and treasures the friendships she's made,' protective of You-friendship even while expanding circle to include Riko, 'genuinely interested in befriending' new members. Tempered by 'not all that great at reading people' (reddit B), 'stubborn and quick to anger,' and 'snide deadpan expressions' when friends act strange — her care is warm-broadcast but not Emma-tier hyper-attuning. Net solidly high through sustained mission-of-helping-others-shine.

U.reason: Low per U-requires-external-and-internal-alignment rule. Her central self-narrative IS ordinariness — explicitly 'Normal Monster Chika,' reddit C: 'by and large just an ordinary person... stereotypically average,' deliberately written as relatable-everygirl-protagonist (parallel to Kanon-Liella INFP at U=-3). Surface specifics exist (mikan obsession, ryokan family inn, pun-explaining habit, three-sisters family dynamic) but core archetype is conventional-aspiring-shy-girl-finds-passion executed warmly. Reddit C explicitly frames her ordinariness as her defining feature among the wackier Aqours members. Net negative.

N.reason: Moderate-high N. Ni-aux signature visible in: ocean-running-for-new-feeling moment after 0-vote loss ('I just thought I would feel something / get a new idea' is classic Ni-waiting-for-convergent-insight per PDB B), lyric-writing-process waits-for-inspiration rather than brainstorming-many-options, singular-vision-pursuit-then-revision arc structure (locked onto μ's-imitation, had to revise to find own-shine), future-projection of shine-concept as guiding internal-vision. Tempered by family-tradition Si-tertiary anchoring (inn, sisters, hometown rooting) and concrete-tactical-problem-solving (mikan trolley). Not Setsuna-tier abstract-visionary.

chika_takami.mbti_reasoning: ENFJ with strong fan vote majority (185 vs 60 ENFP, ~75/25) and textual analysis supports it. The lopsided-with-stereotype-pull concern is mild here because the leader-protagonist archetype actually pulls ENFP harder by franchise-precedent (Honoka), so ENFJ winning 3:1 against the stereotype-default type is meaningful evidence rather than aesthetic projection. PDB ENFJ voters are explicitly arguing against the ENFP-as-lazy-default reading, which is the right shape of vote-vs-stereotype-pull alignment. Decisive Fe-over-Fi evidence: (1) Explicit emotion-suppression-for-group-morale: 'tries hard not to cry when she is sad or frustrated, as she feels it would drag down others' morale.' Textbook Fe-harmony-management. Fi-doms express authentic emotion even when inconvenient (compare Hime crying openly, Sumire tantrums, Kasumi being-mean-openly). Chika actively masks for the group's sake. (2) Mission is liberating-others-to-express-themselves: helps Ruby/Hanamaru break out of shells, helps Yoshiko accept herself, makes Riko believe in her piano. Pure Fe-relational-enabling — same pattern as Setsuna's 'help others feel comfortable saying what they love.' Fi-doms care about specific people but don't have this systematic helping-others-find-their-voice mission as core. (3) Mediates group-conflicts when others can't: steps in for Kanan/Mari fight when Dia freezes. Fe-Ni reading the group-state and intervening for harmony. Fi wouldn't intervene this way; Fi protects own values and lets others have theirs. (4) Role-model imitation pattern: she tried to BE like Honoka, copy μ's path. Fi-doms resist external models in favor of authentic-individuation; they don't structure their identity around 'I want to be like X.' Fe-doms readily orient toward admired models because the model represents what works relationally. Decisive Ni-over-Ne evidence (the harder sub-call): PDB opinion B catches the strongest Ni signature in the dataset — the running-into-the-ocean moment after the 0-vote loss with 'I just thought I would feel something / get a new idea' is classic Ni waiting for convergent insight rather than Ne brainstorming possibilities; her lyric-writing waits for inspiration to arrive rather than generating many options; she locks onto a singular vision (μ's path) and has to revise it when reality breaks it, rather than generating multiple alternatives in parallel; the 'find my own shine' arc structure is Ni-vision-refinement (single vision corrected through reality-feedback) not Ne-possibility-cascade. ENFP would have multiple parallel interests/possibilities (Chika has ONE laser focus: school idols), brainstorming-style creative output (Chika waits for insight), authentic emotion expression including negative (Chika suppresses), resistance to imitation (Chika imitates Honoka explicitly). ENFP doesn't fit. ESFJ ruled out: she does have family-inn tradition rooting and admires μ's as past-historical-reference, but cognition isn't Si-anchored — she's not pulling from concrete past-experience-catalog to make decisions; she's projecting forward toward a single internal vision-of-what-could-be. ESFJ would methodically execute proven steps from tradition; Chika is iterative-vision-pursuit through repeated failure. INFJ ruled out by clear extroversion (approaches, mediates, leads, recruits, talks-to-strangers) — INFJs are reserved with Fe channeled through specific bonds; Chika broadcasts. First Aqours character analyzed and joins the ENFJ family alongside Setsuna/Megumi/Yu (Nijigasaki). Closest cognitive relative is Yu specifically — both protagonist-leaders who started without a defining special skill, both build their groups around helping others find their shine, both have 'Normal' self-narrative at start. Both are pastor-flavor ENFJs (Setsuna is missionary-flavor, Megumi is visionary-flavor, Yu/Chika are pastor-flavor). Difference from Yu: Chika has more substantive self-doubt arc and more aggressive failure-recovery loops. Yu's arc is gentler — 'I haven't picked my own thing yet' rather than Chika's 'I'm a Normal Monster who can't shine.' Chika's individuation-finding-own-shine arc gives her slightly more Fi-aux-flavored ENFJ presentation, but the cognitive engine is still Ni-Fe — her 'shine' is defined relationally (what makes the audience feel something, what makes Aqours unique vs μ's), not articulated through Fi-internal-values-statement. Confidence ~80/20 ENFJ over ENFP. If someone argued ENFP hard, the strongest counter is the cumulative pattern of emotion-suppression-for-harmony, helping-others-shine systematic mission, and Ni-insight-waiting creative process.

riko_sakurauchi.name: Riko Sakurauchi

E.reason: Strong introvert. 'Reserved, kind, polite and modest,' 'likes indoor activities, acting as a foil to her friends the more energetic Chika and You,' 'rather shy,' self-intro explicitly 'very ordinary high school girl with a very plain personality.' Opens up slowly and selectively — dorky-playful side only emerges with close-bonded people (Chika, eventually Yoshiko). Phone-confiding with You shows depth of introvert-confiding pattern (goes to specific-trusted-person rather than broadcasting). Similar range to Shizuku (-5) — reserved baseline with selective emotional-opening. Not more negative because she does substantially integrate socially across the arc and eventually loves her new community deeply.

J.reason: Moderate J. Piano-practice-discipline as multi-year craft-mastery, composer role for Aqours requires sustained structured creative-output, 'levelheaded, calm and mature' baseline, disciplined academic-musical background from Otonokizaka. Tempered by 'flies into a panic when under pressure, jumping to conclusions and making mistakes' — inferior-Ne overwhelm pattern that breaks her J-structure under stress. Not max because panic-reactivity under pressure plus performance-freeze-trauma show J-structure isn't bulletproof.

T.reason: Strong F. Entirely emotional-cognition — her piano-trauma is felt-inadequacy-for-audience (Fe-harmony-concern), her music-abandonment was emotional-retreat, her depression-rut at series start is affect-level not logic-level, her care for bonded-people is felt-immediate, tournament-vs-friends wavering is emotional-conflict not utility-calculation. No analytical cognition anywhere — her decisions come from felt-conviction and group-state-concern. Not max because craft-discipline (piano/composition) provides some technical-analytical-surface, and she can be 'levelheaded and mature' in non-pressure modes.

C.reason: Low. Self-described 'very ordinary high school girl with a very plain personality,' foundational-piano-trauma (froze at recital), self-intro literally 'I have absolutely no confidence in doing well as an idol,' 'doesn't think she's special,' reddit C/D read genuine-depression-baseline at series start ('sunk into a depression,' 'nothing is fun anymore'), reddit A: 'Even more a Normal Monster than Chika.' Grows substantially across arc into confident-composer-and-performer by end, but baseline at introduction is substantially low. Similar range to Kosuzu (-7) and Mei (-5) but not as extreme as Kosuzu because Riko has earned-craft-competence providing some bounded-confidence-domain.

M.reason: Low per M = WANT not WORK rule. Didn't want to be an idol — Chika explicitly 'dragged her into it,' self-intro: 'I was dragged here by Chika-chan who is so stubborn and doesn't believe me at all.' Piano was her passion but she ABANDONED it due to trauma — not pursuing it actively at series start. Stated dream is other-oriented: 'to fulfill the dreams of everyone who gave me such a special place' — group-gratitude-mission rather than self-directed-ambition. Similar to Ayumu (+2) pattern — hardworker-following-catalyst. Slight positive because she does eventually commit genuinely and put in real composer-work across two seasons, but original want is quiet and reactive rather than driving.

O.reason: Slight positive through earned-arc. Starts in depression-rut ('nothing is fun anymore' per reddit C, piano-abandonment indicates meaningful-hope-loss), but does recover substantially across 2 seasons (reddit D: 'maturation from start to finish was a joy to watch,' reddit E: 'greatest development out of all the Sunshine cast'). Per Rule 5 (resilience-not-cheerfulness), her resilience is earned-slowly through Chika's sustained-belief and group-support rather than native-optimism. Not more positive because baseline is genuinely low and recovery is entirely arc-driven — without Chika's intervention, she would likely have stayed in her rut.

A.reason: High empathy through Fe-aux relational-care. Cares deeply for bonded-people (phone-confides in You, supports Chika when Chika is down by copying her 'normal monster' act to comfort her, eventually bonds with Yoshiko despite initial reluctance), mirrors/adapts to support others (absorbs Yoshiko's 'Lili' verbal tics after their episode, copies Chika's comfort-gestures), composes FOR the group as gift-to-community, 'deeply cared about Uranohoshi' despite only just moving there. Tempered by reddit D's valid critique — treated Yohane flippantly after their bonding episode (bounded-warmth edge) — and her quiet-reserved baseline limits broadcast-range. Solid high through Fe-aux but not Emma-tier broadcast-empathy.

U.reason: Low per U-requires-external-and-internal-alignment rule. Self-described 'very ordinary,' 'very plain personality,' reddit A: 'Even more a Normal Monster than Chika,' reddit A: 'aside from her piano skills there's really nothing much to her, like she's just there.' Internal-self is deliberately-ordinary-by-design. Surface specifics exist (piano-craft-mastery, cynophobia, yuri-manga interest, Otonokizaka-Maki's-piano-legacy, transferee-from-Akihabara-to-rural-Numazu) but these are mostly external-detail not eccentric-cognition. Same territory as Chika (-3) and Kanon (-3) — relatable-ordinary-girl-by-design, surface-particularity without internal-eccentricity.

N.reason: Strongly S. Concrete Si-anchor throughout — moved to Numazu for specific-physical-inspiration (sound-of-the-sea as concrete sensory-anchor for creative-recovery), piano-practice-discipline through concrete-repetition, past-performance-trauma-catalog shapes present-decision-making (past-freeze informs future-reluctance), concrete-craft-mastery through sustained-practice, hears melody-notes during scuba-diving (Si-present-sensory-capture). Inferior-Ne visible as panic-jumping-to-conclusions-under-pressure (unexpected-possibilities overwhelm her). No abstract-visionary content, no long-range-future-projection. Strong Si-dom.

riko_sakurauchi.mbti_reasoning: ISFJ with clear fan vote majority (159 vs 95 ISTJ, ~63/37) and textual analysis supports it. Voting pool offered only Si-dominant-J-introverted-types (ISFJ vs ISTJ), so the contested axis is narrow — just Fe-aux vs Te-aux (with corresponding Ti-tert vs Fi-tert). Going F-aux decisively. The PDB A opinion's ISTJ argument actually undermines itself — the claim is that Riko uses Ti-tert ('considers what's reasonable'), but the cited evidence is 'she stopped playing because she felt her music would be lacking for others.' That's Fe-audience-harmony-concern, not Ti-logical-framework-deduction. The word 'felt' is doing the work; a Ti-tert user would frame it as 'my music objectively doesn't meet the technical standard,' but Riko's concern is 'I'm not giving them what they deserve' — pure Fe. The PDB A author even self-edited with 'I don't agree with this anymore however I still think she's a feeler all in all,' recognizing the evidence pointed F all along. Decisive Fe-aux-over-Te-aux evidence: (1) Music-self-worth is audience-reception-indexed. Her piano-trauma wasn't failing to express herself — it was failing to deliver to the audience. Fi-tert musicians play for self-expression regardless of reception; Fe-aux musicians break when the audience-harmony-circuit breaks. Riko is categorically the second. (2) Tournament-vs-friends wavering per reddit B's example. She wavers because she doesn't want to disappoint Aqours/Uranohoshi. Fi-tert (ISTJ) wouldn't waver on personal-passion-vs-group-obligation — Fi-tert is subordinate to Si-Te and would execute the utility-logic clearly (attend-tournament-for-career-advancement). Riko gets emotionally torn because her care-for-group is aux-level, strong enough to compete with her personal-piano-drive. (3) Mirroring patterns. Starts acting like Yoshiko after their bonding episode (absorbs 'Lili' tics), copies Chika's 'normal monster' act to comfort Chika. Fe-aux mirrors to build warmth; Fi-tert resists mirroring in favor of authentic-self. Fi-tert especially wouldn't absorb other people's verbal tics — that's aux-Fe-level absorption, not tert-Fi. (4) Stated dream is other-oriented gratitude-mission ('fulfill the dreams of everyone who gave me such a special place'), not Fi-authentic-self-pursuit. (5) Opens up through specific-bonded-people (You phone call is canonical Fe-aux pattern — releases through trusted-specific-bond rather than processing privately first). The Te-aux case is thin — Riko has no Te-executive-cognition anywhere. She doesn't analyze utility-first, doesn't organize systems, doesn't judge by effort-metrics. She frets, she feels, she cares about reception, she mirrors. No Te. INFP ruled out by clear Si-anchor (concrete-sound-of-ocean-as-inspiration, past-trauma-catalog-shapes-present, craft-through-repetition) — INFPs have Ne-aux abstract-possibility-generation, not Si-concrete-sensory-catalog. ENFP/ENFJ ruled out by clear introversion. Second Aqours character analyzed, and joins the ISFJ family — sixth ISFJ across the four casts (Ayumu, Kanata, Shizuku Nijigasaki; Sayaka Hasunosora; Kinako Liella; now Riko). The caretaker cluster continues as the most common type across the analyzed casts. Riko slots into the Ayumu/Shizuku flavor-range specifically. Ayumu-parallel: both have self-deprecating 'I'm ordinary' introductions, both follow a protagonist-catalyst into the idol world (Yu→Ayumu / Chika→Riko), both have hardworker-follower low-M ambition pattern, both have specific-catalyst-devotion as anchor-relationship. Shizuku-parallel: both have craft-mastery (acting/piano) with hidden-depth interior behind the reserved surface. Riko is essentially Ayumu-with-craft-trauma — the Ayumu-flavor ISFJ who has a specific-performance-wound driving her arc, routed through musical-craft rather than devoted-friendship. Confidence ~85/15 ISFJ over ISTJ. The ISTJ case is defensible on surface (calm/mature/disciplined presentation) but collapses on cognitive-engine inspection — her feeling-function is auxiliary-level, not tertiary-level.

kanan_matsuura.name: Kanan Matsuura

E.reason: Solid introvert. 'Isn't as talkative as her fellow third years, speaking the least of them in the anime,' stoic-quiet baseline, reserved-laid-back-mature default-mode, spends significant time alone (family diving shop on offshore island, morning workout routines swimming/running, grandfather-only household). Has close-specific-bonds (Mari/Dia/Chika/You as childhood friends) but doesn't broadcast outward. Post-Mari-drama year-and-a-half cocoon-distance period confirms introvert-default under stress. Not more negative because she has warmth-output when engaged with bonded-people (Hagu-shiyo hugging-readily catchphrase, friendly-when-approached) and functions comfortably as respected-senpai when role demands.

J.reason: Slight P. 'Breezily mature, rarely sweats the details,' 'usually maintains a calm, cool and even stoic demeanor,' Se-flow-state-loving (self-intro: 'when I'm swaying in the blue waves and swimming straight ahead without thinking about anything, my mind somehow goes blank'), adaptive-laid-back rather than structured-planner, 'doesn't get very good grades... doesn't like reading and easily gets tired of it' (low-academic-structure-discipline). Tempered by real responsibility-execution (runs the shop for injured father, choreographer-role requires structured creative output, senior-reliable dependability). Net slight P through present-oriented-flexibility overriding responsibility-structure.

T.reason: Moderate F. Fi-values-conviction drove her defining arc-decision (the Mari-lie sacrifice — chose to feign stage fright and push Mari toward studying abroad because she believed it was best for Mari's future, at cost to her own dream and relationship), deeply-caring-emotional-cognition, 'very kind, warm-hearted and altruistic,' decisions come from felt-values not utility-calculation. Not more negative because Te-tertiary gives her pragmatic-decisive-execution capacity (can carry out difficult-decisions for values-aligned ends) and stoic-breezily-mature presentation provides T-surface that softens F-affect expression.

C.reason: Moderate positive. Confident in physical-competence-domains (athletic-dancer, diver, runner), mature-laid-back-bearing respected by first-years as senpai, reliable-senior pattern, comfortable leading choreography as Aqours' main choreographer, 'intelligent and level-headed.' But carried significant shame/guilt through the year-and-a-half Mari-lie period (aloof-distant-cocoon response, reddit E notes documented throwing-up at events), has specific-fears (heights S2 Ep 8, creaking sounds S2 Ep 2) contrasting with tough surface, struggled substantially post-first-Aqours-disbandment. Earned-through-competence confidence in physical-domain with real emotional-vulnerability-core.

M.reason: Moderate. ORIGINALLY high-ambition — FOUNDED first-Aqours, convinced Mari to join, reddit B: 'the LL protagonist that didn't get her show, headstrong, passionate, and easily takes the central role between Mari and Dia.' That ambition was destroyed by her own Fi-sacrifice-decision (disbanded first-Aqours, pushed Mari abroad). Returns to idol-life reactive-to-Chika's-vision rather than self-directed, becomes main choreographer through earned-role. Per M = WANT not WORK rule — her original want was strong, her post-trauma current want is quieter contentment-with-support-role and acceptance that she's 'okay with not always getting the spotlight' (reddit B). Net moderate through earned-role-commitment.

O.reason: Solid positive. Genuine Se-present-appreciation-optimism baseline — self-intro: 'just looking at such beautiful scenery makes me happy enough every day,' 'happy every day just by being able to see the dazzling sun, the blue skies and the sea.' Recovers well when given the chance (Mari-reconciliation arc, post-haggu-moment stops-being-distant and 'becomes friendly once again'), maintains cheerful-affect by default. Tempered by the year-and-a-half cocoon-distance period, documented somatic-stress-response (throwing up at events), real fears contrasting with tough surface. Default-baseline is genuinely positive when situation permits.

A.reason: High empathy. 'Very kind, warm-hearted and altruistic individual,' 'deeply cares for her friends, being very supportive and often putting their needs above her own, going to great lengths to ensure they get what she thinks is best for them,' Hagu-shiyo hugging-everyone catchphrase, sacrificial-care-even-when-misguided (Mari-lie was misguided but altruistic at core), big-sister-role with Chika (Miracle-Wave mentorship arc, reddit B: 'cares for Chika like an older sister'). Reddit D: 'knew four of the girls in the group directly and had known them for nearly a decade... the girl who knew (nearly) everyone else in the group' suggests sustained-specific-attachment across many relationships. Tempered by the post-Mari-drama-aloofness phase (bounded-Fi-warmth can become exclusionary under stress) and failure-to-realize-others'-feelings-when-convinced-of-her-own-reading (per raw text explicit note). Net solidly high.

U.reason: Mild positive. Distinctive external specifics: lives alone on offshore-island with grandfather, runs diving-equipment shop, founded-then-disbanded-original-Aqours (unique backstory in the group), most-athletic-member, Hagu-shiyo English-catchphrase, frog-robot-with-samurai-voice creative-output (GnY), specific-fear-pattern (creaking sounds, heights) contrasting with tough surface, only-grandfather-family-structure unusual for franchise. Reddit D: 'unique among LL girls' for her pre-series connection-density to seven of nine group members. Internal personality is mostly conventional caring-mature-onee-san-archetype executed well. Net mild positive through external-specifics substantial enough to offset conventional interior.

N.reason: Strongly S. Pure Se throughout — diving/ocean/swimming/running as baseline-existence, direct-sensory-appreciation ('dazzling sun, blue skies and sea'), physical-training-as-care-language (Miracle-Wave coaching), mind-goes-blank-Se-flow-state self-articulated in introduction, athletic-craft-mastery through body (main choreographer role), no abstract-future-visioning anywhere, no possibility-cascade-generation. Solid Se-aux with tertiary-Ni visible as sustained-internal-preoccupation with Mari-drama over years (Ni-tert holding single-abstract-concept across time), but primary mode is strongly present-physical.

kanan_matsuura.mbti_reasoning: ISFP — DISSENTING FROM MAJORITY FAN VOTE. Fans voted ISTP 122 vs ISFP 48 (~72/28). This is the exact situation the instructions warn about: 'athletic, stoic, sporty outdoor girl with mechanical aptitude' aesthetic pattern-matches ISTP hard (diving shop, frog-robot-building, laid-back-stoic demeanor, physical-problem-solving), and a 72/28 split from a Ti-Se-vs-Fi-Se voting pool is precisely what you'd expect if voters are doing stereotype-pull rather than cognition-analysis. Aesthetic projection is the core mistake to avoid per the rules — describe behavior, then type, never type then describe behavior. Stress-testing the ISTP case against the actual behavioral evidence: the decisive case study is the Mari-lie. Kanan feigned stage fright, sacrificed first-Aqours, lied to Mari to push her toward studying abroad, all because she believed it was best for Mari's future. Then she carried the weight of that lie for a year and a half in aloof-distant-cocoon mode. If this were Ti-driven, it would be a utility-calculation: analyze Mari's situation → determine best outcome → execute → move on. Ti-users don't carry emotional weight of past-rational-decisions because the decision-framework stays valid — the outcome either is or isn't Pareto-optimal, and either way the user moves on. Instead: reddit E notes she was literally throwing up at events, couldn't articulate what happened to Mari, went increasingly dismissive-abrasive toward Mari across the gap-year. That's not Ti-detachment — that's Fi-values-wound. She violated her own integrity (lied to someone she loved, even with good intent) and couldn't reconcile with it until forced to confront it. The reconciliation itself is diagnostic: when Mari confronts her with 'I care about you,' Kanan breaks down into the haggu moment — emotional-integration through Fi-values-acknowledgment. A Ti-user would have offered a logical defense of the original decision ('my calculation was correct'); Kanan just accepts the emotional truth and hugs back. Decisive Fi-over-Ti evidence: (1) Mari-lie as Fi-sacrifice-wound carried somatically for 1.5 years, not Ti-utility-calculation. (2) She protects her values at cost to relationships (sacrificed friendship-truth for Mari's-future-wellbeing) — Fi-conviction over Fe-or-Ti-framework. (3) Willingness to hide truth to protect specific-person is Fi-protection-of-individual-value not Ti-analytical-framework-application. (4) Care-expression is physical-direct (Hagu-shiyo hugs, Miracle-Wave coaching, running-family-shop-for-injured-father) — Se-Fi physical-presence-as-care, classic ISFP-aux-pattern not ISTP-aux-tactical-problem-solving. (5) 'Failing to realize others' feelings because she assumes they feel the same as she does' (per raw text) is Fi-projection pattern, not Ti-detachment — Ti would recognize others as separate variables; Fi projects own internal-experience onto others. ISTP case that voters saw: athletic-stoic-baseline, mechanical-aptitude (frog robot), pragmatic-problem-solving surface, poor-grades + reading-dislike (Ti-practical-learner rather than Si-Fe-academic-dutiful). Valid surface observations but each has ISFP-compatible explanation — athleticism is Se-aux not Ti-specific, mechanical-creativity is Se-kinetic-craft not Ti-systematizing, pragmatic-problem-solving was Fi-values-driven not Ti-utility-driven, reading-dislike is Se-kinetic-learner-preference not Ti-specific. Unpacking: (1) Mari detected You was upset (emotional-state-reading), (2) identified the SPECIFIC emotional issue (jealousy about Chika-Riko relationship), (3) chose emotionally-appropriate intervention-words for You's specific-state, (4) used her own-past-experience (moving-abroad, losing-best-friend-Kanan) as emotional-bridge to connect, (5) steered You toward harmony-restoration with Chika. That's Fe-dom precision — reading-specific-emotional-states and intervening with exactly-calibrated-responses. ENTP Fe-tertiary can be warm and helpful but doesn't typically have this level of emotional-attunement-accuracy. An ENTP-Fe-tert might notice You is upset and try to help, but the precision of identification → calibrated-intervention → resonance-through-shared-experience is Fe-dom signature. Additional Fe-dom evidence: Uranohoshi bonfire speech as broadcast-emotional-mission to school-community (Fe-broadcast-for-harmony), took director-role specifically to help-Uranohoshi-and-friends (Fe-mission orientation), big-sister-figure for 1st years (sustained Fe-social-role-taking), acts as harmonizer in 3rd-year trio mediating Kanan-Dia dynamics. Serious-mode transformation is diagnostic: when she drops the persona, she becomes singular-focused-emotionally-present (lower pitch, loses accent, focused-direct-confrontation with Kanan in Ep 9). That's Ni-Fe convergent-serious-mode. ENTPs in serious-mode get more analytical-skeptical; ENFJs in serious-mode get emotionally-focused-missional. Mari is the latter. Ni-aux (ENFJ) vs Ti-aux (ENTP): her sustained-singular-vision about preserving-the-school is Ni (school-as-meaningful-concept carrying memories-with-friends), the 'goofy flashy persona peeled back to reveal serious underneath' is a Ni-Fe constructed-archetype-with-inner-vision pattern (not Ne-Ti playful-exploration), PDB B's attempted Si-argument about her school-preservation is actually Ni-aux tracking meaningful-place-as-abstract-concept not ISxJ-style Si-catalog — she wants to preserve the school as meaningful-symbol of her friendships, not as collection-of-specific-memories. ENTP case (steelmanned): PDB B has real points — 'ready to try her hand at anything' is Ne-explorative, falls asleep when bored (Ne-attention-pattern), mischievous-playful baseline, rule-flouting unconventional approach, industrial metal + experimental interests, 'Amount of effort is not proportional to results!' = Ti-counter-intuitive-principle. Each has an ENFJ-compatible reading though: 'Ready to try anything' = Fe-adventurous-engagement-with-world + Se-tertiary-thrill-seeking (ENFJs with Se-tert are often bold-adventurers), falls-asleep-when-bored = low-stimulation-tolerance not uniquely Ne, mischievous-playful = Fe-social-playfulness common to extroverted types, rule-flouting = Fe-Ni-unconventional when rules serve no harmony-purpose + Se-tert impulse, 'effort not proportional to results' is MOTIVATIONAL statement used to push friends forward (Fe-using-principle-for-harmony-purpose, not Ti-framework-building-for-its-own-sake). The deciding factor: Mari's consistent emotional-attunement-and-intervention precision across the cast (You, Kanan, Dia, school-community, individual-intervention on multiple axes) is the best Fe-dom signature in Aqours. ENTPs don't have this emotional-precision-skill even with good Fe-tertiary. And her arc-structure is pure Fe-Ni — sustained emotional-mission (preserve school + repair-friendship) pursued across years with serious-focused-vision underneath flashy-performative-exterior. Eighth Aqours character analyzed. FIFTH ENFJ across the four casts (Setsuna + Yu Nijigasaki, Megumi Hasunosora, Chika Aqours, now Mari). Flavors: Setsuna is missionary (share passion with world via dual-identity), Megumi is visionary (global-scale ambition), Yu is pastor (help everyone shine), Chika is pastor-with-individuation-arc (help-others-find-their-shine through own-normalness-struggle). Mari is the rescued-heiress ENFJ — flashy-performative-exterior masking trauma-wound (arranged-marriage + sheltered-childhood), with Fe-broadcast-mission taking the form of preserving-the-friendship-circle-and-school-that-saved-her. Different from Setsuna's outward-passion-broadcasting; Mari's Fe is more inward-circle-preservation-oriented while still being outward-performative. Structurally closest to Setsuna specifically — both have constructed-performative-personas over hidden-serious-wounds that their Ni-vision serves to resolve, both have the performative-outward-energy-with-drop-into-serious-mode transformation pattern. Setsuna's persona is idol-enthusiast-passion masking strict-household-constraint; Mari's is eccentric-rich-goofy-manic-pixie masking arranged-marriage-trauma. Different aesthetic-clothing over same Ni-Fe rescue-through-sustained-vision architecture. Confidence ~60/40 ENFJ over ENTP. This is a genuinely contested call — the ENTP aesthetic-surface (playful-mischievous-experimental) is real and the 46% ENTP vote reflects authentic-observation, not just stereotype-projection. The ENFJ call rests on Fe-dom precision-attunement evidence that requires looking at specific intervention-scenes rather than baseline-personality-surface. Flagging confidence heavily because this is a real judgment-call, not a slam-dunk. If someone argued ENTP hard, the strongest counter is the You-intervention-precision-case combined with the serious-mode-convergence pattern being classically Ni-Fe rather than Ne-Ti.
